label: 1st
description: Highlights the most common category in each region

label: Top
description: Highlights the most common category in each region

label: 2nd
description: Highlights the 2nd most common category in each region

label: 3rd
description: Highlights the 3rd most common category in each region

label: Bottom
description: Highlights the least common category in each region

label: 1stPct
description: Shows the percentage share of the most common category in each region

label: 2ndPct
description: Shows the percentage share of the 2nd most common category in each region

label: Change
description: Shows the change in the selected metric between two time periods. Requires an interval (two years) in the When field.

label: Top3
description: Colors each region based on its top 3 categories combined, assigning a unique color to each unique combination

label: Diversity
description: Shows the Religious Diversity Index (RDI) for each region, measuring how evenly distributed the categories are

label: DiversityPew
description: Shows the Pew-adjusted Religious Diversity Index for each region, using grouped categories similar to Pew Research methodology
